description: Regression for the reported 'Custodian Guard charge roll SUCCESS then charge move failed — skipping' bug. AI Custodian Guard (5x 40mm circular) charges a congested Deffkoptas cluster (75x42mm OVAL bases, 5/6 alive) with a second Deffkoptas unit adjacent — the geometry that made the old heuristic placement produce overlapping/inconsistent moves the phase validator rejected. The AI must complete the charge: charged_this_turn set, no 'charge move failed' in the log, and the unit fights the Deffkoptas (the fight phase only offers a fight to a unit within engagement range, so this doubles as the ER proof; a direct min-edge-distance check is racy because the AI-vs-AI runthrough kills the target in the same turn).
